headline: PG&E (PCG) Stock Could Be 27.1% Below Fair Value as Grid Spending Narrative Builds
summary: PG&E stock overview after recent price moves PG&E (PCG) has drawn fresh investor attention after recent price moves, with the stock last closing at $16.48. That puts the company’s market value around $36.3b, supported by annual revenue of $25.8b and net income of $2.8b. See our latest analysis for PG&E. Recent trading has been mixed for PG&E, with a 1-year total shareholder return of 19.94% contrasting with a 3-year total shareholder return that is slightly lower and a 5-year total...
